title: Content Validator (Telugu + English)
description: We are building a next-generation news platform delivering validated information. We need detail-oriented individuals passionate about fact-checking and content quality.
requirements: Proficient in both Telugu and English
Strong interest in journalism, fact-checking, or content review
Ability to research and verify information from reliable sources
Strong attention to detail and analytical thinking
expectations: Ensure accuracy and authenticity before publishing
Cross-check content with trusted and verified sources
Maintain consistency in content quality and standards
Dedicate 2–3 hours per day (Flexible)
workOn: Review and validate blogs/articles in Telugu and English
Collaborate with writers to maintain publishing standards
growthPath: Performance-based earnings / revenue sharing model
Opportunity to grow into a full-time role based on accuracy and consistency
Real-world exposure to digital journalism

title: Content Writer (Telugu + English)
description: Join our mission to deliver simple and accessible information. We are looking for passionate individuals interested in building a career in journalism.
requirements: Proficient in both Telugu and English
Strong interest in journalism, news writing, or content creation
Ability to research and write fact-based content
Basic understanding of current affairs / trending topics
expectations: Take full responsibility for accuracy and authenticity
Content must be based on validated and reliable sources
Consistency and quality are key evaluation factors
Dedicate 2–3 hours per day (Flexible)
workOn: Write blogs/articles in combined Telugu and English format
Create content based on verified facts
Take full ownership of published content
growthPath: Revenue-sharing model (Higher potential based on performance)
Build a strong writing portfolio
Direct conversion to full-time based on writing quality and contribution

title: Frontend UI/UX Developer Intern
description: Work on real-world applications for scalable, app-first technology products. We follow a performance-driven, real-world evaluation model.
requirements: Hands-on experience with frontend development (Intermediate level)
Strong HTML, CSS, JavaScript knowledge
Responsive design & layouts
Basic React (components, props, state basics)
Knowledge of React Native is a plus
expectations: This is NOT a training program; practical experience is required
Dedicate at least 3 hours per day (flexible timing)
Available to contribute on weekends when required
Open to both students and working professionals
workOn: Building responsive and scalable UI components
growthPath: Phase 1 – Internship (0–3 Months): Unpaid, live project evaluation
Phase 2 – Apprenticeship (3–6 Months): Selected candidates receive stipend
Phase 3 – Full-Time Opportunity: Direct conversion based on performance

title: React + Firebase Developer Intern
description: Build scalable products using React and Firebase. This role focuses on end-to-end web application features in a fast-paced environment.
requirements: Hands-on experience with React & Google Firebase (Intermediate level)
React (components, hooks, state management basics)
Firebase Authentication
Firestore / Realtime Database
API integration & backend connectivity
expectations: Practical experience is mandatory (not a training program)
Minimum 3 hours daily commitment
Weekend availability as required
Work From Home (Remote)
growthPath: Phase 1 – Internship (0–3 Months): Live project evaluation
Phase 2 – Apprenticeship (3–6 Months): Selected stipend-based phase
Phase 3 – Full-Time Opportunity: Performance-based offer

title: React Native + Firebase Developer Intern
description: Develop scalable, app-first technology products for mobile platforms using React Native and Firebase.
requirements: Hands-on experience with React Native & Firebase (Intermediate level)
React Native (components, navigation, state management)
Firebase Authentication & Firestore
Ability to build mobile app features end-to-end
expectations: Practical experience required; NOT a training program
3 hours per day minimum (flexible)
Weekend contribution required when necessary
Work From Home (Remote)
workOn: Mobile app development using React Native
growthPath: Phase 1 – Internship (0–3 Months): Unpaid evaluation
Phase 2 – Apprenticeship (3–6 Months): Stipend provided
Phase 3 – Full-Time Opportunity: Direct conversion

title: Database / Backend Developer Intern
description: Work on backend architecture, database design, and scalable system development using modern databases such as MongoDB, MySQL, and Firebase. The role focuses on building production-ready applications with efficient data handling and API integrations.
requirements: Hands-on experience with at least one database: MongoDB / MySQL / Firebase
Strong understanding of database design (SQL or NoSQL)
Experience with Firebase (Authentication, Firestore / Realtime DB) OR REST APIs with backend
Basic knowledge of backend development (Node.js / Express or similar)
Understanding of CRUD operations, indexing, and query optimization
expectations: Must have practical project experience (not just theoretical knowledge)
Minimum 3 hours per day commitment
Availability on weekends for critical tasks if required
Open to students and early professionals
Willingness to learn and adapt to different database technologies
workOn: Collaboration with frontend and mobile teams
growthPath: Phase 1 – Internship (0–3 Months): Unpaid evaluation
Phase 2 – Apprenticeship (3–6 Months): Stipend-based selection
Phase 3 – Full-Time Opportunity: Performance-based offer

title: Fashion Designer (Creative Partner)
description: We are building a next-generation fashion brand and looking for highly creative Fashion Designers who want to think and work like owners. This is an opportunity to build your portfolio, showcase creativity, and create real market impact.
requirements: Strong fashion design skills and creative thinking
Ability to deliver high-quality, market-ready designs
Exceptional creativity and originality
Understanding of trends, styles, and audience preferences
Basic to intermediate knowledge of textile and apparel industry
Knowledge of printing and production techniques (DTF, DTG, Screen Printing, Puff Printing, Embroidery, UV Printing)
expectations: Ownership mindset and consistency
Ability to deliver original and high-quality work
Willingness to collaborate and iterate based on feedback
workOn: Designing apparel collections (T-Shirts, Hoodies, Sweatshirts, Pants, Caps)
Developing creative concepts for fashion products
Building personal design identity and portfolio
Working as a creative partner in a fashion brand
growthPath: Phase 1 – Pilot Project: Creative exploration and initial product launches
Phase 2 – Revenue Sharing: Earnings based on product sales performance
Phase 3 – Long-Term Role: Opportunity to become a full-time creative partner
